mapper.select: select distinct s.code,s.sort from sys_subsystem s inner join sys_subsystem_menu r on s.id = r.subsystem_id inner join sys_role_menu u on r.menu_id = u.menu_id inner join sys_role sr on u.role_id = sr.id inner join sys_user_role ur on sr.id = ur.role_id inner join sys_menu m on r.menu_id = m.id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and r.menu_id not in (select id from sys_menu where target in ('modifyPwd','exitSystem','home')) and r.menu_id != '1' and m.is_show = '1' and m.type_ not in ('3','4') order by s.sort
